title: China Deploys Carrier Strike Group Near First Island Chain Amid Balikatan Exercises
summary: China sends carrier strike group as US-led Balikatan exercises deploy missiles along First Island Chain in South China Sea.
contents:
## China Deploys Carrier Strike Group Near First Island Chain Amid Balikatan Exercises

### Overview
China sends carrier strike group as US-led Balikatan exercises deploy missiles along First Island Chain in South China Sea.

### Details
China deploys carrier strike group during Balikatan exercises. US allies position missiles across First Island Chain. Tensions rise over China's 'historical rights' claims in South China Sea.

### Geographic context
Location: South China Sea.

### Source attribution
